chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.688 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 26.08.2025 Mr. Anas Siddiqui, Advocate for the applicant a/w the applicant. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl. PG Sindh. Proposed accused Ms. Fatima present in person. ------------------------------- Proposed accused namely Ms. Fatima is present in person who claims to be of 17 years of age and submits that the remaining proposed accused are all siblings. For reasons to be recorded later, this criminal miscellaneous application is hereby dismissed. J U D G E Asif
